title: Green Thumb Indus Earnings Estimates, EPS & Revenue
text: Benzinga provides comprehensive earnings estimates and forecasts for Green Thumb Industries (GTBIF). The consensus estimates show expectations for continued earnings growth through 2024 and 2025. EPS estimates for 2024 project earnings of around $0.32 per share, representing significant growth from prior year results. Revenue estimates for 2024 project approximately $1.1 billion, with continued growth expected in 2025. These estimates reflect analyst consensus on the company's ability to grow revenue while expanding profitability. The earnings estimates incorporate expectations for continued retail expansion and CPG segment growth. The company's ability to exceed analyst estimates on both revenue and EPS in recent quarters demonstrates strong operational execution. Management's guidance typically falls within analyst expectations, indicating reliable communication. The strong earnings momentum through 2024 provides confidence in continued earnings growth in subsequent periods.
